## Pull Request

### Description
<!-- What does this PR do? Why is this change needed? -->

### Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🌐 Translation update
- [ ] 🔧 Build / CI change
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

### Related Issues
<!-- Closes #123 -->

### Testing Done
<!-- How did you test this? What device/Android version? -->

- [ ] Built and installed debug APK successfully
- [ ] Tested recording (Standard quality)
- [ ] Tested recording (High quality / WAV)
- [ ] Tested on Android 8.0+ (API 26)
- [ ] Tested on latest Android (API 36)

### Screenshots / Recordings
<!-- For UI changes, add before/after screenshots or screen recordings -->

### Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines in [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] All new source files have SPDX copyright headers
- [ ] Commit messages follow the [Conventional Commits](CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-message-guidelines) format
- [ ] I have updated documentation where necessary
- [ ] No new lint errors introduced (`./gradlew lint`)
